name: ai-research-companion
description: Human-led AI research companion workflows, project memory, and observable status boards for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Research router, mentor, schema, MVP planner, training monitor, status board, and change memory.
interface.longDescription: AI Research Companion adds human-led research workflows for project schema setup, project onboarding, skill routing, related-work scouting, idea taste judgment, experiment memory review, training run monitoring, observable project status boards, project change memory, MVP planning, progress review, weekly review, and context checkpointing.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use AI Research Companion to help me set up, evaluate, and progress a human-led research project.
